title: Video Conferencing Session Manager
description: Basic pseudocode for managing a video conferencing session
code:
CLASS VideoConferenceSession
BEGIN
 DECLARE participants as List
 DECLARE sessionActive as Boolean
 
 PROCEDURE initiateSession(hostID)
 BEGIN
 sessionActive ← TRUE
 CREATE connection for hostID
 FOR EACH participant IN participants
 SEND notification to participant
 END FOR
 END PROCEDURE
 
 PROCEDURE addParticipant(participantID)
 BEGIN
 IF sessionActive = TRUE THEN
 CREATE connection for participantID
 ADD participantID to participants
 BROADCAST "Participant joined" message
 END IF
 END PROCEDURE
 
 PROCEDURE transmitMedia(streamType, data)
 BEGIN
 FOR EACH participant IN participants
 ENCODE data using compression
 SEND encoded data via network
 END FOR
 END PROCEDURE
 
 PROCEDURE endSession()
 BEGIN
 FOR EACH participant IN participants
 CLOSE connection
 END FOR
 CLEAR participants
 sessionActive ← FALSE
 END PROCEDURE
END CLASS
explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates the basic structure of managing a video conferencing session including initiation, participant management, media transmission, and session termination.

title: Carbon Footprint Calculator
description: Algorithm to calculate carbon savings from replacing travel with video conferencing
code:
PROCEDURE CalculateCarbonSavings(numberOfMeetings, avgDistance, transportMode)
BEGIN
 // Carbon emission factors (kg CO2 per km)
 DECLARE emissionFactors as Map
 emissionFactors['flight'] ← 0.255
 emissionFactors['car'] ← 0.171
 emissionFactors['train'] ← 0.041
 
 // Calculate travel carbon emissions
 travelEmissions ← 0
 FOR i = 1 to numberOfMeetings DO
 factor ← emissionFactors[transportMode]
 travelEmissions ← travelEmissions + (avgDistance * 2 * factor)
 END FOR
 
 // Video conferencing emissions (equipment, electricity)
 // Approximately 0.003 kg CO2 per minute of call
 videoConfEmissions ← numberOfMeetings * 60 * 0.003
 
 // Calculate savings
 carbonSavings ← travelEmissions - videoConfEmissions
 
 // Calculate percentage reduction
 reductionPercentage ← (carbonSavings / travelEmissions) * 100
 
 RETURN carbonSavings, reductionPercentage
END PROCEDURE
explanation: This algorithm calculates the carbon emissions saved by replacing business travel with video conferencing, comparing transportation emissions against the minimal emissions from hosting virtual meetings.

complexity.time: O(n) where n is number of meetings
